expectations.text: Anemia classified as MODERATE (Hb 9.2 is in 7-9.9 range)
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'Anemia status: Moderate anemia — Hb 9.2 g/dL (WHO pregnancy threshold: moderate = 7.0-9.9 g/dL)'

expectations.text: Iron dose is 120mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic, not prophylactic)
expectations.evidence: Line 36: 'Iron: 120 mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic dose)'
Line 65: 'Hemoglobin recheck in 4 weeks (approximately 15 weeks GA) to assess response to therapeutic iron'. 4 weeks falls within the 1-3 month range.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling on iron-rich foods mentioned
expectations.evidence: Lines 51-54: 'Increase consumption of iron-rich foods (dark leafy greens, legumes, red meat when available, organ meats, fortified foods)', 'Consume vitamin C-rich foods with meals to enhance iron absorption', and advice on avoiding tea/coffee with meals.
